description: The SAP S/4HANA Sales connector provides APIs that enable seamless integration with the [Sales Organization - Read API v1.0.0](https://api.sap.com/api/API_SALESORGANIZATION_SRV/overview). The service allows users to read sales organization master data.
key-features: Read sales organization master data from SAP S/4HANA
Seamless integration with the Sales Organization - Read API v1.0.0
Support for basic and OAuth 2.0 authentication
Operations for querying sales organization data
communication-scenario: SAP Analytics Cloud for Planning Integration
